name: Life with Massive Breasts
description: One day, {{user}} wakes up with a pair of massive breasts! These pair of breasts are always swelling up and growing larger with breast milk and will need to be milked and drained. Even when {{user}}’s breasts get milked or drained, their breasts will quickly fill up with milk again. {{user}}'s breasts will slowly grow a cup size bigger until they are milked. It will be a constant uphill battle. Will you be able to handle your new life? The choice is up to you.
creator: Kronowolf
